result.result:
## This week on agent-office (Apr 13–18, 2026)

All work landed on `main`. A feature branch `feature/phase-5-telemetry` was merged mid-week (3199451).

**Phase 1–4: foundation → office UI (Apr 13)**
- `bd59458` Phase 1 Foundation, `6a1ede2` Phase 2 Agent Core (personas/skills/launcher), `ca066d7` Phase 3 Memory Engine, `eaebe7c` Phase 4 Office UI with animated scene and pixel-art sprites (`69510ec`).

**Engine extraction + office canvas (Apr 14)**
- Extracted the pixel-agents engine into modular pieces: constants/types (`a88a3c6`), sprites (`54fcd13`), floor/walls (`00cdc7b`), layout (`9df83eb`), core engine (`769983d`), browser asset loader (`fd62f21`).
- Wired a 25×20 office with 7 themed zones (`a4ef81e`), React `OfficeCanvas` wrapper (`c8c8f57`), 3-column dashboard (`68467b0`), and launched Claude Code in iTerm2 tabs (`64ed75e`).
- First claude-mem integration: read-only SQLite adapter (`d109f26`), persona filter (`e079b4f`), preview API (`acdddfa`), `LaunchPreview` component (`27cb1d3`, `91ae92e`).

**Phase 4.5/4.6 merge + Phase 5 telemetry (Apr 14–15)**
- `6b61356` merge of 4.5/4.6; `2534692`/`3199451` complete Phase 5 telemetry dashboard with provider adapters and portfolio stats (`4d9806d`), launch picker redesign (`42aab52`), local skill roots (`a4cb528`).

**Provider-neutral history + stability (Apr 16)**
- `9c4afb4` provider-neutral project history ingestion, `3b9f1a9` `doctor` command, fixes for live-session presence (`a8f6bd4`, `aaa47ed`), codex history summaries (`fc03de3`), port resolution (`ef1cec2`).

**Unified memory + LaunchWizard (Apr 18)**
- `4d9a58a` persona-scoped memory brief generator; `17bf243` wires the brief into live launches; `ec56fb9` renders it in `LaunchPreview`.
- `2dbef00` exposes unified memory stats + semantic search and drops the claude-mem fallback (touches `src/api/routes/{memories,personas,projects}.js`, trims `launcher.js`).
- `3c1cf94` persona memory stats + semantic search in ProjectPicker.
- `3b6c0b4` collapses `LaunchPreview` + `ProjectPicker` into a single 4-step `LaunchWizard.jsx` (−1,135 / +938 lines).
- Supporting: `40c5014` brief-vs-raw-memory token-savings bench harness, `01f2a70` Playwright LinkedIn carousel capture, `18e1cbb` README rewrite around unified-memory USP, `d5da889` office simplified to Boss/Workspace/Dungeon + Fixer persona.

**Decisions worth flagging**
- Dropped the claude-mem fallback in favor of a unified memory layer (`2dbef00`).
- Consolidated the launch flow into one modal (`3b6c0b4`).

**Uncommitted / uncertain**
- `bench/` and `scripts/bench-whitepaper.mjs` are untracked — per the session memory these are the whitepaper benchmark runner (tasks 23–27, lens project) authored today but not yet committed. I haven't read the files to confirm their current state.
- I didn't verify whether the benchmark has actually been *run* end-to-end — the memory index mentions the design and runner, not results.
